product_overview: SARAS Hub is a web application for administering and taking assessments, managing users and resources, and viewing performance results. It provides both student-facing test workflows and admin tools for test creation, bulk user upload, system settings and analytics.
core_goals: Allow users to authenticate and recover access when needed
Guide students through pre-test instructions, active assessments, and submission confirmation
Enable admins to create tests using a multi-step wizard and manage large user imports
Provide dashboards and result views for students and administrators to review performance
Let users manage profile data and personal uploads and let admins manage system settings and global actions

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in using credentials and recover access via a forgot-password flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter email and password -> Click login button -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to / -> Click forgot password link -> Enter email for recovery -> Submit forgot-password form -> See confirmation message

features.name: Assessment Lifecycle (Student)
features.description: Students read instructions, start a timed test, answer questions, and submit for evaluation with a submission confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /assessments/instructions -> Read instructions -> Start test -> Navigate to /assessments/active -> Select answers -> Submit test -> See submission confirmation at /assessments/submitted

Navigate to /assessments/instructions -> Read instructions -> Start test -> Navigate to /assessments/active -> Attempt to submit with required questions unanswered -> See validation error indicating unanswered questions

features.name: Admin Test Creation (Wizard)
features.description: Admins create new tests through a guided multi-step wizard covering details, question entry, and preview before confirming.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/create-test -> Fill step 1 (Basic info) -> Fill step 2 (Questions) -> Fill step 3 (Preview & Confirm) -> Confirm creation -> See new test listed on /tests

features.name: Bulk User Upload
features.description: Admins upload many users at once by providing a CSV/Excel file and reviewing an upload validation report.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/bulk-upload -> Drag and drop CSV/Excel file -> Click upload -> See validation report summarizing successes and failures
Navigate to /admin/bulk-upload -> Drag and drop a non-CSV/unsupported file -> Click upload -> See validation error about file format

features.name: Admin Dashboard & Global Actions
features.description: Admins view analytics, audit streams and trigger system-level actions such as system lock and master sync, with immediate UI feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /management -> View global trend charts and key metrics -> View recent entries in the audit stream
Navigate to /management -> Toggle system lock -> See confirmation prompt -> Confirm action -> See system lock state reflected in UI
Navigate to /management -> Trigger master sync -> See progress indicator -> See success notification

features.name: User Management (Admin)
features.description: Admins add or modify user records and see changes reflected in the master user table.
user_flows: Navigate to /management -> Open user management section -> Fill new user details (name, email, role) -> Save user -> See new user appear in master table
Navigate to /management -> Open user management section -> Edit an existing user's role -> Save changes -> See updated role in master table

features.name: Profile Management
features.description: Users view and update their personal profile information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Update profile fields (name, contact details, preferences) -> Save changes -> See updated profile information

features.name: Tests & Resources Browsing
features.description: Authenticated users browse available tests and educational resources to prepare for assessments.
user_flows: Navigate to /tests -> See list of available tests with basic details
Navigate to /resources -> Browse educational resources -> Open a resource detail or download item

features.name: My Uploads (User)
features.description: Users manage files they have uploaded and review upload status.
user_flows: Navigate to /uploads -> Upload a new file -> See uploaded file listed with status
Navigate to /uploads -> Delete an uploaded file -> See file removed from the list

features.name: Results & Performance
features.description: Students and admins view test results and attempt-level summaries to analyze performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /results/student -> See personal performance summary and attempt list
Navigate to /results/admin -> See overview of results across users -> Open a student's attempt to view question-level details

features.name: System Settings (Admin)
features.description: Admins change system-level settings such as branding and security policy options and persist changes globally.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Update branding fields (university name, primary color) -> Save changes -> See branding updates reflected in the UI
Navigate to /settings -> Update security policy fields (max login attempts) -> Save changes -> See updated policy values persist after page refresh

routes.description: Multi-step wizard to create a new test
Active test environment with timer and questions

features.name: Assessment Lifecycle
features.description: Taking a test from instructions to submission
